implementationArtifact.specBody:
---
complexity: low
---

# Feature: Add Footer

## Summary

Add a simple footer to the bottom of every page with copyright text.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Footer appears at the bottom of the page
- [ ] Footer contains copyright text with the current year and "BrewBoard"

## Technical Approach

Add a footer element to `src/app/page.tsx`. One line, no complex styling needed.

## Out of Scope

- Do NOT write tests
- Do NOT add documentation
- Do NOT refactor existing code

## Validation

```bash
echo "Feature Add Footer validated"
```

quality.summary: Footer added correctly to page.tsx with current year and 'BrewBoard' text, wrapped in a fragment alongside main. Minimal, clean diff that satisfies both acceptance criteria. Empty implementation log file is slight noise but harmless.

requirements.notes: Both acceptance criteria met: footer appears at bottom of page, contains copyright text with current year via new Date().getFullYear() and 'BrewBoard'. Out-of-scope items respected (no tests, no docs, no refactor).

correctness.notes: JSX is valid: fragment wraps main and footer correctly. new Date().getFullYear() works in client/server render. Tailwind classes are consistent with existing main container styling.

minimality.notes: Diff is small and focused — just wraps existing JSX in a fragment and appends a footer. The empty implementation log file adds a few lines of unused scaffolding but is conventional for the repo workflow.

code_quality.notes: Footer styling mirrors main container width and padding for visual consistency. Indentation and class naming match local style. Slightly verbose padding (p-8) for a one-line footer but acceptable.

risk.notes: No accessibility concerns (semantic footer element used). No regressions to existing layout. Year computed at render time is fine for this static page; SSR/CSR mismatch risk is negligible at year boundary for this use case.
